name: Auth0 Stale Active Accounts (180 days)
description: Detects long-dormant active auth0 accounts with no recent login activity for 180 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_login AS last_login FROM auth0_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.blocked, false) = false AND (u.last_login IS NULL OR u.last_login < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days')
remediation: Immediately disable long-dormant accounts and require formal reactivation approval for reinstatement.
